query:
SELECT c.id, c.code, l.id as lesson_id, l.title, l.lessonOrder 
FROM courses c 
LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId 
WHERE c.code = 'WOR101' 
ORDER BY l.lessonOrder;
